title: Villager Ravagers
body: ![Villager Ravager Logo](https://i.imgur.com/0L8CyCf.png) --- Makes ravagers look like Villagers, rather than Illagers. My goal with this texture pack is to make you ask "why would you do that?" and say "that's disgusting." Enjoy! [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/I3I410P9Q1) ![Images Line Break](https://i.imgur.com/4UV0z4K.png) ![Ravager & its Son](https://i.imgur.com/vCeX5fm.png) ![Ravager in a Village](https://i.imgur.com/WMmbqvX.png) Hrm.
